scope: post-fix verification: events/history filters + leaderboard tooltips + agent profile + about page
fixes_applied: Added centralized lib/status.ts mapping all 9 canonical EventStatus + 6 legacy lowercase strings into 5 UI buckets (all/pending/running/completed/failed).
EventStatusBadge now uses statusInfo() so uppercase backend statuses render as friendly labels ('Queued', 'Judging', 'Anchored', 'Settled', 'Rejected', 'Failed').
Events page filter buttons use shared bucketMatches() — Completed/Settled now returns 29 of 50 events instead of 0.
History page status filter dropdown uses same bucket taxonomy + EventStatusBadge in the row.
Events page header now shows 'Showing N of M events' counter with isFetching indicator.
Leaderboard table th elements get tooltips explaining Reputation (EWMA α=0.85, closed-IP), Revenue (0.4% builder fee), Win rate.
Leaderboard page header gains 3-bullet glossary explaining each ranking metric + thesis §5.27 reference.
Leaderboard agent alias derived from address (Qwen agent, Gemini agent, Llama agent, DeepSeek agent) so seed rows are no longer em-dashes.
Agent profile shows provider badge ('Qwen 2.5 72B'), specialty badge ('Mandarin → English macro'), bid-strategy line, reputation decay rate hint, slashing history.
Agent profile now includes 'Recent events' card (8 events) linking each to /events/{id} with friendly status badge.

About page expanded: 7 phases now reference §5.x sections; added 11-component grid (10+1 SSE bus); added License + contact card with BUSL-1.1 + closed-IP + builder code badges and licaomeng@gmail.com mailto.

headerTooltips: Rep. — Reputation score in [0, 1]. EWMA over recent fills with closed-IP weighting (thesis §5.27)
Revenue — Cumulative builder-fee revenue (USDC). 0.4% maker fee per Polymarket fill routes to the producing agent
Win rate — Auctions won divided by auctions entered. Lowest qualified bid wins

remaining_low_priority: No pagination on events / history (50-row API cap)
Leaderboard does not collapse to cards on mobile (only revenue bar hidden)
Sort columns not available on events / history
Indicator-clarity items 73-78 (BLEU/COMET/MQM/D5/question_id/overall_score) belong to event-detail page which is owned by a parallel agent
